title: National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities (Amendment) Rules, 2010
description: National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities (Amendment) Rules, 2010
text: Page 1 of 2 The Gazette of Indiaअसाधारण EXTRAORDINARY भाग II - खǷ 3-उप-खǷ (i ) PART II-Sector 3-Sub-section (i) Ůािधकार से Ůकािशत PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY सं. 708 नई िदʟी, मंगलवार, िदसɾर 28, 2010/पौष 7, 1932 No. 708 NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2010/PAUSHA 7, 1932 सामािजक Ɋाय एवं अिधकाįरता मंũालय अिधसूचना नई िदʟी , 24 िदसंबर, 2010 सा.का. िन. 1021 (अ)- राʼŌीय ˢ-परायणता, Ůमİˑʺ घात, मानिसक मंदता एवं बŠ- िनःशƅता Ťˑ ʩİƅ कʞाण Ɋास अिधिनयम, 1999 (1999 का 44 ) की धारा 34 मŐ Ůदȅ शİƅयों का Ůयोग करते Šए , कŐ ū सरकार एततȪारा ˢ-परायणता, Ůमİˑʺ घात, मानिसक मंदता एवं बŠ- िनःशƅता Ťˑ ʩİƅ कʞाण Ɋास िनयम, 2000 मŐ संशोधन के िलए िनɻिलİखत िनयम बनाती है, अथाŊ त :- 1. (1) इन िनयमों का नाम ˢ-परायणता, Ůमİˑʺ घात, मानिसक मंदता एवं बŠ- िनःशƅता Ťˑ ʩİƅ कʞाण Ɋास िनयम, 2010 है। (2) ये सरकारी राजपũ मŐ Ůकाशन की तारीख से Ůवृत होंगे। 2. ˢ-परायणता, Ůमİˑʺघात, मानिसक मंदता एवं बŠ-िनःशƅता Ťˑ ʩİƅ कʞाण Ɋास िनयम , 2000 के िनयम 15 मŐ , उप- िनयम (3) हटा िदया जाए । [ फा.सं. 1-22/2009-डी . डी. –IV] ŵीमती पूिणŊ मा िसंह, संयुकत सिचव MINSTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th December, 2010 G.S.R. 1021 (E),- In exercise of the powers conferred by section 34 of the National Trust for Welfare of persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 (44 of 1999), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Rules, 2000, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the National Trust for Welfare of persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities (Amendment) Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Rules, 2000, in rule 15 sub-rule (3) shall be omitted. [F. No. 1-22/2009-DD-IV] SMT. PURNIMA SINGH, Jt. Secy. िटɔणी : मूल िनयम भारत के राजपũ मŐ सा.का. िन. 639 (अ), तारीख 26 जुलाई, 2000 Ȫारा Ůकािशत िकए गए थे और तद्पʮात सा.का. िन. 201 (अ), तारीख 8 माचŊ , 2002 और सा.का. िन. 478 (आ), तारीख 15, जुलाई, 2005 Ȫारा संशोिधत िकए गए थे। Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification number G.S.R. 639 (F), dated the 26th July, 2000 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers G.S.R.201 (E), dated the 8th March 2002 and G.S.R. 478 (E), dated the 15th July, 2005. -- 1 of 2 -- Page 2 of 2 अिधसूचना नई िदʟी , 24 िदसंबर, 2010 सा.का. िन. 1022 (अ)- राʼŌीय ˢ-परायणता, Ůमİˑʺ घात, मानिसक मंदता एवं बŠ- िनःशƅता Ťˑ ʩİƅ कʞाण Ɋास अिधिनयम, 1999 (1999 का 44 ) की धारा 35 की उप- धारा (1) और (2) मŐ Ůदȅ शİƅयों का Ůयोग करते Šए , बोडŊ एततȪारा कŐ ū सरकार के पूवŊ अनुमोदन से Ɋास बोडŊ िवनयम, 2001 मŐ संशोधन कने के िलए िनɻिलİखत िविनयम बनाती है । अथाŊ त :- 1. (1) इन िविनयमों को Ɋास बोडŊ (संशोधन ) िविनयम 2010 कहा जाएगा। (2) ये सरकारी राजपũ मŐ Ůकाशन की तारीख से Ůवृत होंगे। 2. Ɋास बोडŊ िविनयम , 2001 मŐ , िविनयम मŐ , उप-िविनयम 16 के पʮात िनɻिलİखत उप- िविनयम शािमल िकया जाए अथाŊ त: “(16 क) मुƥ कायŊ पालक अिधकारी की पदाविध – जब तक कŐ ū दरकार Ȫारा अɊथा िनदेश िदए जाएं मुƥ कायŊ पालक अिधकारी की पदाविध उनके पदभार Ťहण करने की तारीख से 5 वषŊ अथवा उनके Ȫारा 60 वषŊ की आयु Ůाɑ करने तक, इनमे से जो भी पहले हो, होगी।“ [ फा.सं. 1-22/2009-डी . डी. –IV] ŵीमती पूिणŊ मा िसंह, संयुकत सिचव NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th December, 2010 G.S.R. 1022 (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub- sections (1) and (2) of Section 35 of the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 (44 of 1999) , the Board with the previous approval of the Central Government, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Board of the Trust Regulation, 2001, namely:- 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Board of the Trust (Amendment) Regulations , 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Board of the trust Regulations, 2001, in regulation 3, after sub-regulation (16) the following sub-regulation shall be inserted namely:- “(16 A) Term of office of the Chief Executive Officer. Unless otherwise directed by the Central Government, the term of the office of the Chief Executive Officer shall be for a period of five years from the date on which he enters upon his office or until he attains the age of sixty years, whichever is earlier.” [F. No. 1-22/2009-DD-IV] SMT. PURNIMA SINGH, Jt. Secy. िटɔणी : मुƥ िविनयम भारत के राजपũ िदनांक 3 अगˑ, 2001 की अिधसूचना संƥा सा.का. िन. 579 (अ) के तहत Ůकािशत िकए गए थे और तद्ȶर16 फरवरी, 2004 की अिधसूचना संƥा सा.का. िन. 123 (अ) और िदनांक 27 जून, 2006 जे सा.का. िन. 403 (अ) के तहत इनमŐ संशोधन िकया गया था। Note: The principal regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide notification number G.S.R. 579 (E), dated the 3rd August, 2001 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers G.S.R 123 (E), dated the 16th February, 2004 and G.S.R. 403 (E), dated the 27th June, 2006 -- 2 of 2 --
